summary: Patch the project owner platform-role synchronization migration to support the production database role layout.

notes: Migration 116 no longer assumes a postgres database role exists on production.
Function ownership is assigned to postgres when available, otherwise to psa_admin.
Migration 116 was not recorded in production schema_migrations before this patch because it failed inside its transaction.

verification: Run static project-role platform sync migration coverage check.
Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.12.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.12.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.12.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
Git may warn that LF will be converted to CRLF on this Windows workstation.
